title: あれもこれもで、悩んじゃいます！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eeny, meeny, miny, moe! ♪ I don't care if it's rain
or snow, help me choose where I should go!
choice_data_list: That's a cute rhyme you got going there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eep! Wh-what rhyme? Y-you heard nothing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I guess it's no use trying to hide that I was singing... You see, I have today off, so I was thinking about what to do.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But the more I thought about it, the more things
started popping into my head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm tempted to go out to eat something yummy,
but maybe I should do some running instead...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Back in Hokkaido, the only place I could really go
on my days off was the nearby farm, so I'm not
used to having so many choices. Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do you think I should do?
choice_data_list: You should treat yourself to something tasty.
You should treat yourself to something tasty.
Go everywhere that pops into your head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do you think I should do?
choice_data_list: You should treat yourself to something tasty.
You should treat yourself to something tasty.
Go everywhere that pops into your head!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're totally right! All righty, I'm gonna head
into town and eat a whole bunch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the suggestion! Ehehe. What should I
start with?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hamburger steak, or ramen... Eeny, meeny, miny,
moe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that's an option too! I guess living in the city means I can go all-out and do something like that!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It took aaages to get from one place to another
back home, you know? Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oops! I can't be all wishy-washy now! Don't wanna
waste my precious time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'm gonna head out and visit all the places! Thanks for the advice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, Special Week runs off with glee.
